name: pytech-rules

metadata.name: pytech-rules
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3 or later (AGPLv3+)

documentation:
# PyTech Rules

## Description
This project aims to provide tools to handle dynamic data structure conversions through rules definition.

The goal is to be able to define rules to translate data structs that may be incomplete and miss data.

## Roadmap
You may find some new features coming in the [Issue section](https://gitlab.com/pytech-srl/resources/pytech-rules/-/issues)

## Authors and acknowledgment
This package is provided thanks to:

- Alessandro Grandi (PyTech srl)

functions.name: pytech.rules.rules.validate_rules
documentation:
Check if given rules are valid.
If the check fails it raises an error, otherwise no action is performed.

```
param rules

a dict of Rules

raises

TypeError, ValueError
```

functions.name: pytech.rules.rules.apply_rules
documentation:
Validates the provided rules.
If the check passes the rules are applied to the data to create a new dict.

```
param rules

a dict of Rules

param data

the dict of data to convert

return

the dict data created applying the rules
```

classes.name: pytech.rules.rules.Rule
documentation:
Rule type dataclass

fields -> the list of fields to use for the conversion
convert -> a callable to use to compute the value

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions._multiply_by
documentation:
Returns a callable that multiplies the param for a given value

```
param _n

the multiplier to use

return

the callable that multiplies for the given value
```

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions._rotate_angle_by
documentation:
Returns a callable that rotates the param of a given value
It then normalize the value between 0° and 360°

```
param _n

the angle to use for the rotation

return

the callable that rotates the angle of the given value
```

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions.last
documentation:
Returns the last element of a list

```
param list_of_elements

a list of elements

return

the last element of the list
```

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions.make_false
documentation:
A function that always returns False.

```
param _

any number of values

return

False
```

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions.no_conversion
documentation:
A function that returns the param as is.
\:param n: the value to return
\:return: the given param

functions.name: pytech.rules.conversions.safe_stdev
documentation:
Standard deviation that returns 0 if only one value is provided else stddev value
\:param list_of_elements: a list of elements
